Package org.eventb.core.seqprover

Interface ITranslatableReasonerInput

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAllD.Input, AbstractManualRewrites.Input, AbstrExpr.Input, DTDistinctCase.Input, ExF.Input, ForwardInfHypsReasoner.Input, ForwardInfReasoner.Input, HypothesesReasoner.Input, HypothesisReasoner.Input, LocalEqRewrite.Input, MngHyp.Input, MultipleExprInput, MultiplePredInput, PFunSetInput, PredicatePositionReasoner.Input, Review.Input, SingleExprInput, SinglePredInput, TotalDomRewrites.Input
public interface ITranslatableReasonerInput
Common protocol for reasoner inputs that support formula factory translation.

This interface is intended to be implemented by clients who make their own type of reasoner input and want to support proof translation for their reasoners. This is required in order to work properly with mathematical language extensions in proofs. Proofs using reasoners with a non translatable input will not be fully reusable.

NB: reasoner inputs that subclass a translatable input must also override the methods of this interface if they contain formulas (predicates, expression, identifiers, ...) or contribute to the required type environment anyhow.

Since:
3.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ITypeEnvironment
    getTypeEnvironment(FormulaFactory factory)
    Computes the required type environment to use for parsing this reasoner input.
    IReasonerInput
    translate(FormulaFactory factory)
    Translates the formulas inside this reasoner input using the given formula factory.

  • Method Details

    • translate

      IReasonerInput translate(FormulaFactory factory)
      Translates the formulas inside this reasoner input using the given formula factory.
      Parameters:
      factory - the factory to use for translation
      Returns:
      the translated reasoner input
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the translation fails

    • getTypeEnvironment

      ITypeEnvironment getTypeEnvironment(FormulaFactory factory)
      Computes the required type environment to use for parsing this reasoner input.
      Parameters:
      factory - the factory to use for making the type environment
      Returns:
      the required type environment of this reasoner input
